conclusion: Current selected-c1 c2 512/128 retained-bench path now attaches the combined c2/c4/c8 projection-dispatch catalog and selects benchmark_accepted_caware_projection. Generated-token equality remains [137,137], primitive correctness is loaded/passed, profiler evidence is captured, batch_execution.blockers is empty, and projection-dispatch blockers are absent. This is not a throughput claim: the artifact remains blocked by selected-c1 MoE retained metadata and aggregate_vs_c1 scaling.

aggregate_vs_c1 scaling remains below retained performance threshold for c2
c4/c8 current rowchunk selected-c1 artifacts still need projection-dispatch attachment if they are promoted beyond existing correctness/profiler evidence

decision_reason_summary: scaling.ratios.aggregate_vs_c1 must be > 1.0 for retained performance claim
execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.moe_decode_path must be grouped_compact for retained c>N MoE decode
